default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Abnormal Security to discuss SEO performance, content publishing, and onboarding challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO performance is showing positive trends post-migration, but full indexing is still in progress](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Content publishing is significantly behind schedule (11 published vs. 50 planned), creating a bottleneck for SEO testing and performance](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Onboarding issues persist for Sydney, hampering her ability to access Abnormal's CMS and accelerate content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Post-Migration

  - [Impressions are lagging due to ongoing Google indexing of Abnormal's content](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Average position improved to 27, indicating positive movement for indexed content](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Full website re-indexing (Abnormal.ai) expected to take 3 months total](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [AbnormalSecurity.com URLs still ranking on Google, redirecting to Abnormal.ai](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [Glossary pages showing slight improvement in performance](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

### Content Publishing Challenges

  - [Only 11 out of 50 planned articles published, with 37 pending](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Last publish date was April 30/May 1, creating a 2-week gap](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Emily (content publisher) aimed for 3 articles/day but is falling short](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [10 glossary pages updated; next batch to include FAQs and images](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [5 AI glossary pages ready for submission by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)

### Onboarding and Access Issues

  - [Sydney still lacks proper access to Abnormal's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Background check process incomplete; criminal background check missing](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Confusion over which email (work vs. personal) should receive forms](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Abdallah to follow up with HR (Alison) for resolution](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Alternative solutions discussed: Using Sydney's US passport/address or Jason's SSO](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Content Strategy and Testing

  - [New content (post-migration) showing better indexing and ranking signals](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Pre-migration content (April 15) underperforming due to indexing issues](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [Plan to refresh underperforming content in 1-2 months if needed](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Testing glossary page updates; adding FAQs and images in next iteration](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Abdallah to follow up with HR to resolve Sydney's background check and access issues](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [Push Emily (or her manager) to increase content publishing rate (3-4 articles/day)](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Sydney to send 5 AI glossary pages by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Explore options to streamline content submission process for Emily](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=835.0)
  - [Continue monitoring SEO performance, especially for newly published content](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Implement FAQ and image additions to next batch of glossary pages](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Consider Jason's SSO as a backup option for Sydney's access if issues persist](https://fathom.video/share/XrXTW92GPZkbUvMDvtAHm3aUabjcTWMr?tab=summary&timestamp=976.0)

action_items.description: Follow up w/ HR (Alison) re Sydney's background check status, timeline. Push for proper form w/ criminal check.
Contact Emily, push for 3-4 article pub/week. Escalate to Emily's boss if needed. Ask preferred content format for faster pub.
Prep 5 AI glossary pages, send to Emily by end of week. Include FAQs, images where possible.
Explore alt options for Sydney's CMS access (e.g. Jason's SSO). Update Sydney on progress.
